name: HorizonBooks Analytics Pipeline
description: End-to-end data pipeline for HorizonBooks: ingestion via DataFlow Gen2, staging in Lakehouse/Warehouse, transformation through Spark notebooks (Bronze→Silver→Gold), orchestration via Data Pipeline, and analytics via Semantic Model.

tasks.name: Ingest CSV Data
tasks.description: Load Finance, HR, and Operations CSV data into staging using DataFlow Gen2 (DF_Finance, DF_HR, DF_Operations).

tasks.name: Stage Raw Data
tasks.description: Store ingested data in StagingLH (Lakehouse) and StagingWH (Warehouse) for Bronze layer processing.

tasks.name: Transform Bronze to Silver
tasks.description: Clean, validate, and transform raw data from Bronze to Silver layer using NB01_BronzeToSilver notebook.

tasks.name: Enrich with Web Data
tasks.description: Enrich Silver data with external web sources (book covers, ISBNs) using NB02_WebEnrichment notebook.

tasks.name: Transform Silver to Gold
tasks.description: Build star schema (Facts + Dimensions) in Gold layer using NB03_SilverToGold notebook.

tasks.name: Store Gold Analytics Data
tasks.description: Persist final star schema tables in HorizonBooksLH Lakehouse for analytics consumption.

tasks.name: Orchestrate Pipeline
tasks.description: Coordinate end-to-end execution: DataFlows → Notebooks (NB01→NB02→NB03) via HorizonBooks Data Pipeline.

tasks.name: Visualize & Analyze
tasks.description: Semantic Model (HorizonBooksAnalytics) exposing star schema for Power BI reporting and analysis.
